prompt:
Abstract tracked-changes revision marks, flowing horizontal
signal-green chartreuse strokes underlining and striking
through invisible text, scattered warm parchment-cream caret
marks and small annotations drifting in the margins, ink-bleed
softness at each stroke edge, cool ink-near-black background,
editorial revision-pass atmosphere, sparse and intentional
placement, compositional weight in the upper half with quiet
measure below, no text no words no letters no typography no
labels no people no objects
title: You Don't Need a Better Prompt. You Need Selection Pressure.
subtitle: Use an AI content generator long enough and your output drifts. The third option: a population of prompts under selection pressure — and an agent that builds the review app for its own output in an afternoon.
